episode: Last week I had a hard time understanding the GIL in Python.
response: I'm here to help you with that! The Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) in Python is a mechanism used in the Python interpreter to ensure that only one thread executes Python bytecode at a time. This can sometimes lead to performance limitations in multi-threaded applications. If you have any specific questions or need further clarification on this topic, feel free to ask!
